zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Fox是William Fox的女兒，於1464年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾。她於大約1483年與John Bustard結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1517年在英國奧可福爾阿德波利享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭奧可福爾阿德波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Fox是William Fox的女儿，于1464年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾。她于大约1483年与John Bustard结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1517年在英国奧可福爾阿德波利享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰奧可福爾阿德波利。

nameMeanings.name: Fox
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from a word denoting the animal (Middle English, Old English fox), widely used to denote a sly or cunning individual. It was also used for someone with red hair. In England this surname absorbed some early examples of surnames derived from the ancient Germanic personal names mentioned at Faulks and Foulks .
Irish: part translation of Gaelic Mac an tSionnaigh ‘son of the fox’ (see Tinney ).
Irish: also adopted for Ó Catharnaigh, see Kearney .

variants.name: Faulks
meanings: English: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Fauque, Fauques, Fau(l)ques (oblique case Fau(l)que), originally an ancient Germanic byname Falco, meaning ‘falcon’.

variants.name: Foxman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Charna, Isadore, Shmuel.

variants.name: Fuchs
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Hans, Kurt, Gerhard, Fritz, Mathias, Matthias, Armin, Ulrich, Erwin, Helmut.

German and Jewish: from Middle High German vuhs, German Fuchs ‘fox’, a nickname for a sly or cunning person, or for someone with red hair. This surname is also found in France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine), Poland, Czechia, and Slovenia, often as a translation into German of corresponding Slavic nicknames or surnames. Compare Fox 4, Fuks , and Futch .

variants.name: Kearney
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Seamus, Caitlin, Declan, Dermot, Donovan, Eamonn, Liam.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Catharnaigh ‘descendant of Catharnach’, a personal name meaning ‘warlike’. Alternatively, it may be from Ó Cearnaigh or Mac Cearnaigh (from cearnach ‘victorious’) or from Ó Ceithearnaigh ‘descendant of Ceithearnach’, a personal name meaning ‘foot soldier’.

History: Most present-day bearers of this name are descended from Tadhg Ó Catharnaigh, killed in battle in 1084. He was nicknamed An Sionnach ‘the Fox’, and for this reason the Irish surname was sometimes Anglicized as Fox . Denis Kearney, born in Oakmont, Ireland, in 1847, was a US labor movement leader.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Fox was born in 1464, in Northamptonshire, England as the daughter of William Fox. She married John Bustard about 1483. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 8 daughters. She died in 1517, in Adderbury, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Adderbury, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Fox est née en 1464, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, fille de William Fox. Elle a épousé John Bustard environ 1483. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en 1517, à Adderbury, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Adderbury, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Fox wurde 1464 in Northamptonshire, England, als Tochter von William Fox geboren. Sie hat um 1483 John Bustard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb 1517 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Adderbury, Oxfordshire, England und wurde in Adderbury, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Fox è nata il nel 1464 nel Northamptonshire, England come figlia di William Fox. Lei sposato John Bustard circa 1483. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1517, nel Adderbury, Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Adderbury, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Adderbury, Oxfordshire, England: イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアアッドエルブリー

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Foxは1464年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアでWilliam Foxの娘として生まれた。約1483年にJohn Bustardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1517年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアアッドエルブリーで53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアアッドエルブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Fox(은)는 1464년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 William Fox의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1483년 John Bustard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1517년 영국 스퍼드실르 애더버이에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 애더버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Fox nasceu em 1464, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra filha de William Fox. Ela casou-se com John Bustard aproximadamente 1483. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1517, em Adderbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Adderbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Fox родилась в 1464 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия. Её отца звали William Fox. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Bustard около 1483 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла в 1517 г. в местности аддирбури, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности аддирбури, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Fox nació en 1464, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra como hija de William Fox. Se casó con John Bustard aproximadamente 1483. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en 1517, en Adderbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Adderbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
